sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement (Top-View Stages)
special_mechanics.description: Free-directional scrolling overhead perspective where player locates and destroys enemy base cores

special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement (Side-View Stages)
special_mechanics.description: Horizontal forward-scrolling shooter gameplay with traditional shoot-em-up mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Default twin forward shot, single forward/backward shot, bomb shot in top-view. Upgradeable weapons including Hunter. Weapon loss on destruction except defaults

special_mechanics.name: CRAW Add-ons
special_mechanics.description: Up to two small pods orbiting ship. Block weak bullets and provide extra firepower. Lost on ship destruction. Exclusive item temporally increases orbit speed

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Thunder Force II is a scrolling shooter shmup with no documented character/ship physics parameters available. Movement is controlled by player input in free-directional (top-view) and horizontal (side-view) stages. No gravity, jump, acceleration, or sub-pixel system data is documented in available sources.
